subject: Tell Congress: Do more to fight racism
body:
Petition: Congress must take action after Charlottesville

Add your name (http://org2.salsalabs.com/o/6857/p/dia/action4/common/public/?action_KEY=25246)

Dear Activist,

Last week on Rachel Maddow, I outlined what our next steps should be to actively fight white supremacy, including isolating the President, using the courts to challenge injustice, and pressuring Congress to act.

The NAACP Legal Defense and Educational Fund (LDF) is a nonpartisan, nonprofit 501(c)(3) organization that has been at the forefront of civil rights litigation and advocacy for over 75 years.

Sign our petition now to urge your members of Congress to do the following: (http://org2.salsalabs.com/o/6857/p/dia/action4/common/public/?action_KEY=25246&)

• Hold oversight hearings with the Department of Justice and other agencies that enforce criminal and civil rights laws to find out what they're doing to counter white supremacist groups. • Oppose any judicial and executive nominees who have given platform to, supported, or condoned white supremacist activities, organizations, or ideology. • Hold hearings on and pass legislation to restore the full protections of the Voting Rights Act, and other bills that would protect the right to vote. • Refuse to allocate funding to the Presidential Commission on Election Integrity. Our political leaders must go further than simply tweeting their outrage – and we must continue to hold them accountable in the days and weeks ahead.

Add your name now and tell Congress you will not stand idly by as white supremacists threaten the lives of people of color, Jews, and LGBTQ individuals. (http://org2.salsalabs.com/o/6857/p/dia/action4/common/public/?action_KEY=25246)

This isn't a political moment. This is an American moment.

With you in struggle, Sherrilyn A. Ifill
President and Director-Counsel P.S. If leaders have been elected to represent us, we have a right to expect that they will use the powers they have to get America back on track. Tell them exactly what they must do to fight white supremacy – add your name now. (http://org2.salsalabs.com/o/6857/p/dia/action4/common/public/?action_KEY=25246)

(https://www.facebook.com/naacpldf)

(https://twitter.com/NAACP_LDF)

(https://plus.google.com/108803770698050923402/posts)

name: The White House
subject: On the Frontlines Protecting Our Borders
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=7c5aa26a0cd2a12a5a59d9a46ccf24b77f58979abe4c0b22daf9982bad0cefc86e886e395a7d5b0fb640d159c53966bfac05a743c38a4245

President Donald J. Trump is committed to our Nation’s heroes – the brave men and women who put their lives on the line every day to protect Americans – and continues to ensure they are a priority. Today, President Trump is signing the Veterans Appeals Improvement and Modernization Act of 2017 to ensure our heroes have the great, timely care they deserve.

-------------

President Trump visits US Customs and Border Protection Facility

Yesterday, President Trump traveled to Arizona, to see first-hand the people and tools restoring law and order to our southern border. He met with USCBP personnel and saw the state-of-the-art equipment used to secure our border at the main base of operations for the USBP’s Yuma Sector.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=7c5aa26a0cd2a12a7a8585d2f526e7f2945f4e1cbc3b1d8e4c83cfc6cde5bb2e8394306f61806837d6098be60933eb8095c41391b6e9266a
Watch the video

Delivering Results for the American People

President Trump instituted tough immigration policies that have reduced illegal border crossings over the southwest border by 47 percent compared to the same period last year. And so far in fiscal year 2017, ICE has removed over 2,700 criminal gang members, compared to 2,057 criminal gang members in all of fiscal year 2016.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=7c5aa26a0cd2a12aab908786760fd36c7bbcb5c4644d629abace34bac6559d54a898f35f890f968f8bd6e9e6535b8eed9f9e5405959ba7ca
Read more

“Border Walls Work. Yuma Sector Proves It.”

Acting DHS Secretary Elaine Duke writes that the USCBP facility in Yuma, Arizona, “serves as a prime example of how investments in personnel, technology and a border wall can turn the tide against a flood of illegal immigration and secure our homeland.”

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=7c5aa26a0cd2a12a4f954a90351a93224d694f8dc64668115990f27b26222d51834f1e5f305f8ebf63c70667bc0572c7fdb4b3c0f9268ef3
Read more

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump tours a Predator Drone and Helio | August 22, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead)

POTUS and VP TODAY

Today, President Trump is in Reno, Nevada. He will give remarks to the National Convention of the American Legion this afternoon and then sign the Veterans Appeals Improvement and Modernization Act.
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=7c5aa26a0cd2a12a573e9993516961f51636a2faef66cb5e3d5681f11f9005752cce972ed0dfd2ce02df09cae0bd274b02eef1207f1a1508
Watch live at 2pm EST
Vice President Pence is in Miami, Florida, to meet with United States Southern Command service members. Later, the Vice President will participate in a listening session with Venezuelan exiles, activists, and community leaders and deliver remarks to the community.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=7c5aa26a0cd2a12ac37bfc725239f4180719d836ee97dee5d61ee9330c1012e49a61bc81aba42a85cbd48a22ffea67ed7dc338c536397f29
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=7c5aa26a0cd2a12aec47e8dc429252ee23c205733aa19dea76be2718a8b80cdf7062d89675be546aa8f38d6311ab7f64c5d8d9d1c91e295e
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4801d1baeb20febf88d0d499a0736e6ca4c7797e3999c2b4cd51b5b9dc750bf2f890ee45b201605e7f8e26c23ebc1aefa
Unsubscribe

**Show your support in our efforts to secure the border.**
[**Show Your Support**](http://click1.action.gop.com/qvfjpqwcfbntgqgqtvrvwtywhytchhvrjsgvsmymsfpghs_vjvfjjmggrh.html?a=17786605)
Peter -- The radical left wants to play games with our national security to further their extreme agenda.

Well, thankfully, they are not in charge. . . We are.

Over the last six months, our president has kept his promise to enhance border security and enforce our immigration laws.

Just look at what our conservative majority is doing to keep you safe:
* Authorizing the construction of a border wall.
* Putting more boots on the ground by adding 5,000 Border Patrol Agents and 5,000 Customs and Border Protection Officers.
* Making supporting our men and women in blue a top priority of this administration.
* And cracking down on so-called "Sanctuary Cities."

**[Show your support for a safe America>>>](http://click1.action.gop.com/rkthtfrsvqjpgfgfpkbkrpyrwypswwkbhngkncycnvtgwk_vjvfjjmggrh.html?a=17786605)**

The radical left and biased media cannot stand the idea that we are enforcing our nation's laws. From lies to delay tactics, they are trying to undermine our government in every possible way.

We need to show them that we will never believe their lies.

Will you stand with your conservative majority and signal your support for a safer America?

Trump must be stopped.
---
**Pitch in $3 or more to help elect Democrats who will fight to defeat Donald Trump's dangerous agenda.

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405237ca/4067b0a/3df36e199/7e6fd036/1256419586/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/Elect-Democrats-2017-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170823_joc_nd&source=em_20170823_joc_nd&refcode=em_20170823_joc_nd")**
Last night was awful, Derek. But it doesn't have to be this way.

We can have leaders who will unite us instead of embracing the hatred that drives us apart.

We can have a president who shares our American values and respects the institutions that make this country great, and not one who undermines our First Amendment freedoms at every turn.

We can invest in growing our economy, creating good-paying jobs, and guaranteeing health care as a right, or we can build a wall that is rooted in hatred and fear-mongering.

**[We can secure a future for this country that we know is right. But we must elect more Democrats.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405237ca/4067b0a/3df36e199/7e6fd037/1256419586/VEsE/ "https://my.democrats.org/Elect-Democrats-2017-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+We+can+secure+a+future+for+this+country+&utm_campaign=em_20170823_joc_nd&source=em_20170823_joc_nd&refcode=em_20170823_joc_nd")**

We need to start this November by electing Democratic governors and legislators in Virginia and New Jersey, and take back the Washington state senate. We need to break the Republican majorities in Congress next year. And in 2020, we need to put a Democrat in the White House. We need more Democrats in office from top to bottom, in every state.

| | Joe Donnelly, one of the Democrats most likely to lose their Senate seat next year, claimed this week that Donald Trump voters are his voters.

Let me put that another way. _Democrat Joe Donnelly, a Senator who votes with ultra-liberal Bernie Sanders 79 percent of the time, thinks that the 1.5 million Hoosiers who voted for Donald Trump are going to vote for him._Can you believe it?!__

Friends, Democrat Donnelly is so desperate to stay in the Senate that _**he’s willing to say anything**_.

And national news outlets are taking note. _The Hill_ and _CNN_ rate Donnelly as the second most likely Democrat seat to flip to Republicans next year.

But that will only happen if we step up our game and _expose Joe Donnelly for who he really is – a Democrat who stands opposed to President Trump’s agenda_.

[**Click here to send an immediate contribution of $100, $50 or $25 to our Defeat Democrat Donnelly Fund.**](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a5ed360aea&e=1acd9bb3d6)

Democrat Donnelly is vulnerable for a number of reasons, not the least of which is because he’s a Democrat in a Republican state. Add to that his votes for Obamacare, his support of Obama’s Iran deal and his opposition to President Trump’s agenda and you’ve got one of the most vulnerable Senate incumbents in the nation right here in Indiana.

That’s not to mention **his blatant hypocrisy**. Democrat Donnelly has a history of saying one thing and doing another – and now it’s time to expose that record to Hoosiers.

[**Send a message to Democrat Donnelly that Hoosiers won’t stand for his hypocrisy by clicking here.**](http://indgop.us11.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=25b3312f3f&e=1acd9bb3d6)

Democrat Donnelly is poised for defeat – and it is Trump voters like you who will make it happen.

Sincerely,

Kyle Hupfer
State Chairman
Indiana Republican Party

_P.S. Seriously, Democrat Joe Donnelly thinks that Trump voters are his voters. It’s unbelievable how out of touch with reality he is. Are you ready to show your support for President Trump by sending a Republican to the United States Senate next year?_ [**Click here to make a $100, $50 or $25 contribution to our Defeat Democrat Donnelly Fund today.**](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0317160fc5&e=1acd9bb3d6)

**PRESS RELEASE**

**For Immediate Release: August 23, 2017**
**Contact: Patrick Hynes, 202-321-5310**
**NH GOP Chair Jeanie Forrester on the New Hampshire Democrat Party Lawsuit filed against the State of New Hampshire over Senate Bill 3**

**Concord -** Today, NH GOP Chair Jeanie Forrester released the following statement regarding the New Hampshire Democrat Party lawsuit filed against the State of New Hampshire over Senate Bill 3 (SB3):

"The frivolous lawsuit put forth by the New Hampshire Democrat Party is just politics as usual. After losing the electoral battle and legislative battle, New Hampshire Democrats are now resorting to a legal challenge. The people of New Hampshire support SB3. The law protects Granite Staters' right to vote. The crucial reforms made in SB3 ensure the integrity of our ballot box.”

###
